summary: Full hard-mode routing design for cslib extension: 4 new files (2 agents + 2 skills) + 3 file modifications. cslib hard agents are justified (7 behavioral gaps vs generic hard agents). Key override: H3 citation conventions (BibKey/references.bib enforcement). All 5 core contracts reusable as-is. No contract override files needed. Lean4 extension is out-of-scope for this task.

artifacts.summary: Complete research: cslib extension anatomy, hard-mode infrastructure inventory, H-technique analysis for CSLib domain, full file inventory (7 artifacts), agent design specifications, manifest routing_hard block, risk assessment, and consistency constraints for future lean4 extension hard-mode.
